glosses.ja: 実行する; 実現する

sentences.target: Je réalise que j'ai oublié les clés.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁe.a.liz kə ʒe ub.lje le kle/

translations.fr: Je réalise que j'ai oublié les clés.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁe.a.liz kə ʒe ub.lje le kle/
translations.en: I realize I forgot the keys.
translations.es: Me doy cuenta de que olvidé las llaves.
translations.de: Ich merke, dass ich die Schlüssel vergessen habe.
translations.it: Mi rendo conto che ho dimenticato le chiavi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我意识到我把钥匙忘了。
translations.yue: 我發覺我唔記得帶鎖匙。
translations.vi: Tôi nhận ra tôi đã quên chìa khóa.
translations.nl: Ik besef dat ik de sleutels ben vergeten.
translations.hu: Most jövök rá, hogy elfelejtettem a kulcsokat.
translations.hi: मुझे एहसास हो रहा है कि मैं चाबियाँ भूल गया हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg innser at jeg har glemt nøklene.
translations.id: Saya sadar bahwa saya lupa membawa kunci.
translations.sv: Jag inser att jag har glömt nycklarna.
translations.ro: Îmi dau seama că am uitat cheile.
translations.cs: Uvědomuji si, že jsem zapomněl klíče.
translations.da: Jeg indser, at jeg har glemt nøglerne.
translations.ja: 鍵を忘れたことに気づいた。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun; subject of the main verb.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person singular); cognitive sense 'to realize/understand'.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a finite content clause.
Clitic subject pronoun 'je' elided before a vowel; subject of 'ai'.
Auxiliary 'avoir', present (1st person singular) forming the compound past with the participle.
Past participle; lexical verb of the subordinate clause in the compound tense.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'clés'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'oublié'.

sentences.target: On réalise cette affiche pour demain.

translations.fr: On réalise cette affiche pour demain.
translations.en: We're making this poster for tomorrow.
translations.es: Estamos haciendo este póster para mañana.
translations.de: Wir machen dieses Plakat für morgen.
translations.it: Stiamo facendo questo poster per domani.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在为明天做这张海报。
translations.yue: 我哋為聽日整呢張海報。
translations.ru: Мы делаем этот плакат на завтра.
translations.pt: Estamos fazendo este cartaz para amanhã.
translations.he: אנחנו מכינים את הכרזה הזאת למחר.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang làm tấm áp phích này cho ngày mai.
translations.nl: We maken deze poster voor morgen.
translations.uk: Ми робимо цей плакат на завтра.
translations.hi: हम कल के लिए यह पोस्टर बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Φτιάχνουμε αυτήν την αφίσα για αύριο.
translations.nb: Vi lager denne plakaten til i morgen.
translations.id: Kami sedang membuat poster ini untuk besok.
translations.sv: Vi gör den här affischen till i morgon.
translations.da: Vi laver denne plakat til i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日のためにこのポスターを作っています。

tokens.explanation: Generic subject pronoun; here colloquial 'we' (3rd person singular agreement).
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular with 'on'); concrete sense 'to produce/make'.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'affiche'.
Common noun, feminine; head of the direct object NP.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase indicating deadline/purpose.
Temporal adverb functioning as the complement of 'pour' to express a due time.

sentences.target: Tu veux réaliser ton rêve cette année.
sentences.reading: /ty vø ʁe.a.li.ze tɔ̃ ʁɛv sɛt a.ne/

translations.fr: Tu veux réaliser ton rêve cette année.
translations.ipa: /ty vø ʁe.a.li.ze tɔ̃ ʁɛv sɛt a.ne/
translations.en: You want to achieve your dream this year.
translations.es: Quieres cumplir tu sueño este año.
translations.de: Du willst dir dieses Jahr deinen Traum erfüllen.
translations.it: Vuoi realizzare il tuo sogno quest'anno.
translations.ko: 너는 올해 네 꿈을 이루고 싶어 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 你想在今年实现你的梦想。
translations.yue: 你想喺今年實現你嘅夢想。
translations.ru: Ты хочешь осуществить свою мечту в этом году.
translations.pt: Você quer realizar seu sonho neste ano.
translations.he: אתה רוצה להגשים את החלום שלך השנה.
translations.vi: Bạn muốn thực hiện ước mơ của mình trong năm nay.
translations.ar: أنت تريد تحقيق حلمك هذا العام.
translations.nl: Je wilt je droom dit jaar waarmaken.
translations.uk: Ти хочеш здійснити свою мрію цього року.
translations.hu: Idén meg akarod valósítani az álmodat.
translations.hi: तुम इस साल अपना सपना पूरा करना चाहते हो.
translations.pl: Chcesz spełnić swoje marzenie w tym roku.
translations.el: Θέλεις να πραγματοποιήσεις το όνειρό σου φέτος.
translations.nb: Du vil oppfylle drømmen din i år.
translations.id: Kamu ingin mewujudkan mimpimu tahun ini.
translations.sv: Du vill uppfylla din dröm i år.
translations.ro: Vrei să îți îndeplinești visul anul acesta.
translations.cs: Chceš si letos splnit svůj sen.
translations.da: Du vil opfylde din drøm i år.
translations.ja: 今年、君は夢をかなえたい。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'veux'.
Main verb, present indicative (2nd person singular); modal-like verb selecting an infinitive.
Infinitive verb; complement (xcomp) of 'veux'.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'rêve'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'réaliser'.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'année' in a temporal NP.
Common noun, feminine; head of temporal NP functioning as an adverbial ('this year').

sentences.target: Nous réalisons un petit film ensemble.

translations.fr: Nous réalisons un petit film ensemble.
translations.en: We are making a short film together.
translations.ko: 우리는 함께 단편 영화를 만들고 있어요.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang làm một bộ phim ngắn cùng nhau.
translations.nl: We maken samen een korte film.
translations.hi: हम मिलकर एक लघु फ़िल्म बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Γυρίζουμε μαζί μια μικρού μήκους ταινία.
translations.id: Kami sedang membuat film pendek bersama.
translations.ja: 私たちは一緒に短編映画を撮っています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural subject pronoun; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person plural); concrete sense 'to make/direct'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'film'.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular, pre-nominal; modifies 'film'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'réalisons'.
Adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates manner ('together').
